Article.ArticleTitle: Pivotal points in the science of dementia risk reduction.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Division of Clinical Geriatrics, Center for Alzheimer Research, Department of Neurobiology, Care Sciences, and Society, Karolinska Institutet, Solna 17164, Sweden; Theme Inflammation and Aging, Karolinska University Hospital, Stockholm, Sweden; Ageing Epidemiology Research Unit, School of Public Health, Faculty of Medicine, Imperial College London, London, UK; Institute of Public Health and Clinical Nutrition, University of Eastern Finland, Kuopio, Finland. Electronic address: miia.kivipelto@ki.se.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: MK reports honorarium from lectures from Eisai, Novo Nordisk, Nutricia, and Roche and advisory board participation from Bioartic, Lilly, Combinostics, and Nestle (personal), outside the submitted work. FM reports honorarium for advisory board participation from Memodio and Lilly (personal), outside the submitted work.
